title: Step 1: Voice interface and recorder voice
description: Create lib/voices/recorder.lua and specs/voice_spec.lua. Recorder captures play_note calls into shared buffer with test helpers.

title: Step 2: MIDI voice backend
description: Create lib/voices/midi.lua with note-off timing via clock.run + clock.sync, active note tracking, retrigger, CC 123 cleanup.

title: Step 3: Refactor sequencer to use ctx.voices
description: Change sequencer.play_note from nb params to ctx.voices[track_num]:play_note. Add specs/sequencer_spec.lua.

title: Steps 4+5: Refactor app.lua + nb voice wrapper + norns entrypoint
description: Refactor app.init(config), create lib/norns/nb_voice.lua, update re_kriate.lua. One commit.

title: Step 6: Seamstress screen UI and keyboard input
description: Create lib/seamstress/screen_ui.lua and lib/seamstress/keyboard.lua. Add specs/keyboard_spec.lua.

title: Step 7: Seamstress entrypoint script
description: Create re_kriate_seamstress.lua wiring MIDI voices, screen UI, keyboard, app init.

title: Step 8: Integration tests and manual verification
description: Create specs/integration_spec.lua. Verify all tests pass with seamstress --test --test-dir specs.

title: Review and merge docs branch origin/multiclaude/clever-deer
description: Validate README and docs/grid-interface.html against current controls; merge if accurate and low risk.

title: Review docs branch origin/work/proud-wolf
description: Check docs/voices.html against current voice architecture and merge if accurate.

title: Review tooling branch origin/work/proud-eagle
description: Validate luacov workflow assumptions and scripts/coverage.sh portability; merge if verification passes.

title: Publish branch inventory and gap map
description: Create a durable branch/PR review note plus visual gap map to drive later merge reviews.

title: Correct docs drift in origin/work/proud-wolf voice explainer
description: Fix docs/voices.html so extended-page activation and default-pattern descriptions match lib/grid_ui.lua and lib/track.lua before merging the branch.

title: Review origin/multiclaude/witty-badger uniqueness
description: Check whether origin/multiclaude/witty-badger still contains any unique content after main before spending time on a full review or merge attempt.

title: Delete stale remote branches for merged PRs (calm-hawk, clever-deer, witty-badger, proud-eagle, proud-wolf)
description: 5 remote branches have merged PRs but weren't deleted. Quick tidy-up.

title: Clean up redundant local branches 003/004/005
description: 003 and 004 point to same commit; 005 is one ahead. All subsumed by 002. Delete local-only cruft.

title: Decomposition review for PR #11 (pdd/seamstress-entrypoint)
description: 104 files, 13K+ additions. Too large to merge as-is. Identify shippable slices, separate runtime artifacts from product code.

title: Assess 002-modifiers-meta-config-presets for simplification
description: Stacked omnibus branch with 10+ unique commits. Needs decomposition plan before any merge consideration.

title: Create branch/gap visualization document
description: Produce a visual summary of repo state: what's merged, what's pending, where gaps exist for future work.
